mnemonics: WILEY 2: Worms, Intruders, Legal, Ethics, You (Your role) - 2 major parts: attacks and response.
keyPoints: Identification of common network attacks like worms and intrusion attempts.
Understanding the legal and ethical frameworks surrounding incident response.
The procedures and methodologies for effective incident response and handling.
commonMistakes: Confusing a virus (requires user interaction) with a worm (self-propagating).
Focusing solely on technical response while neglecting legal and ethical reporting obligations.
Failing to properly isolate a compromised system, allowing an attack to spread further.
